target_task: Phase 4: Task 4.1 - Implement the BaseEpidemicModel class
rationale: Phases 1-3 are complete (compiler, memory pool, hash-based RNG, Numba Gillespie engine, GPU HAL). The next chronological uncompleted block is Phase 4 (PyTorch-style OOP wrapper). Task 4.1 (BaseEpidemicModel) is the foundational pillar: it bridges user-facing string-based compartment definitions to the Numba uint8 engine, enabling SIR/SIS/SEIR subclasses and the mean-field ODE validation tests.
